summary: AgriBooks AP Payment + Verify Workflow Phases 1-4 testing complete. All 18 backend tests PASSED (100%). All frontend tests PASSED. ReviewDetailDialog shows correct balance ₱15,000.00 (not ₱0), wallet_balances with 4 fund sources and real balances, Pay Now panel with lock icons, Verify & Approve button visible even without receipt photos. PaySupplierPage fully functional with 4 fund sources, lock icons, PIN input, disabled Save & Pay button.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/purchase_orders.py: pay endpoint correctly requires PIN (400 when missing, 403 when wrong). Policy key 'pay_po_bank' used for bank/digital, 'pay_po_standard' for cashier/safe.
backend/dashboard.py review-detail: balance correctly read from stored 'balance' field (not recalculated from grand_total), returns wallet_balances for all 4 fund types, payment_history included.
backend/verify.py: PIN_POLICY_ACTIONS includes pay_po_standard (admin/manager/totp) and pay_po_bank (admin/totp only — manager excluded for bank).
backend/journal_entries.py: ap_payment correctly added to ENTRY_TYPES list.
frontend/ReviewDetailDialog.js: showVerifySection uses recordType==='purchase_order' ? true : files.length > 0 — correctly bypasses files gate for POs.
frontend/ReviewDetailDialog.js: Pay Now panel shows 4 fund sources with wallet_balances from API, lock icons on bank/digital, PIN required.
frontend/PaySupplierPage.js: 4 fund source buttons with lock icons on bank/digital, PIN input with data-testid='pay-pin-input', Save & Pay disabled when PIN empty or no amounts.
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
seed_data_creation: No seed data created — used existing PO-20260221051526-D26A (balance=₱15,000.00)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AP Payment Phases 1-4 fully tested and working. Key verified items: (1) /pay endpoint requires PIN (400 missing, 403 wrong), pay_po_bank policy only allows admin/totp (not manager), (2) review-detail returns balance=15000 not 0, wallet_balances with cashier/safe/bank/digital and actual balances, payment_history field, (3) ReviewDetailDialog from AP widget shows balance ₱15,000, Verify & Approve button (no file gate for POs), Pay This PO panel with 4 wallets + lock icons + PIN, (4) PaySupplierPage loads with 24 suppliers, 4 fund sources, lock icons on bank/digital, disabled Save & Pay when PIN empty.
